title: Fix YouTube channel connection status, fix downloads, and show principal IDs in admin panel

requirements.summary: Fix YouTube channel connection status display to correctly reflect connected state when valid credentials exist
acceptanceCriteria: After a user completes the YouTube OAuth flow, the ChannelConnection component shows the channel as connected on subsequent page loads
The useYouTubeChannel hook returns a connected status when valid credentials exist in the backend
The connected state persists across page refreshes without requiring the user to reconnect

file_operations.description: Fix the connected state derivation logic in useYouTubeChannel hook. Ensure the hook correctly reads and returns the connected status from the backend by checking both hasGoogleOAuthCredentials() and isYouTubeChannelConnected(). Update the query logic to properly reflect when a user has already connected their YouTube channel so that ChannelConnection component displays the correct state on page load.

Update the ChannelConnection component to correctly use the connected state from useYouTubeChannel hook. Ensure the component properly displays 'connected' status when valid credentials exist in the backend and handles the loading states appropriately to avoid showing 'not connected' while data is being fetched.

Verify that the OAuthCallback page properly invalidates the YouTube channel connection queries after storing credentials, ensuring the updated connected state is reflected immediately after OAuth flow completion. Add query invalidation for both 'googleOAuthCredentials' and 'youtubeChannelConnection' query keys.

requirements.summary: Fix clip download functionality to successfully trigger file downloads in the browser
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the download button on a ClipCard triggers a file download in the browser
The download hook fetches a valid URL from the backend before triggering the download
If the download fails, an error toast or message is shown to the user

file_operations.description: Fix the download mutation logic to correctly fetch the download URL from the backend via actor.generateDownloadVideoUrl() and ensure the programmatic browser download trigger works. Verify the anchor element creation, URL assignment, click trigger, and cleanup logic. Add proper error handling with toast notifications if the URL fetch or download trigger fails. Ensure the mutation properly awaits the backend response before attempting the download.

Verify the ClipCard component correctly wires the download button to the useDownloadClip mutation and passes the required clip parameters (videoId, startTime, endTime). Ensure loading states are shown during download and that error states from the mutation are surfaced to the user via toast notifications.

requirements.summary: Display user Principal IDs with copy-to-clipboard in admin panel's user management section
acceptanceCriteria: Each user entry in the UserStatusManagement component displays the user's full Principal ID
A copy-to-clipboard button is present next to each Principal ID
Clicking the copy button copies the full Principal ID to the clipboard
The Principal ID is visible in user search results within the component

file_operations.description: Add Principal ID display to each user entry in the UserStatusManagement component. Include the full Principal ID alongside the existing user ID (generated from the principal). Add a copy-to-clipboard button next to each Principal ID that uses navigator.clipboard.writeText() to copy the full principal string. Ensure the Principal ID is visible in both the user search results and any user detail views within the component. Use a monospace font for the Principal ID and add a visual confirmation (toast or icon change) when copied successfully.

requirements.summary: Display clip owner Principal IDs with copy-to-clipboard in admin panel's clip management section
acceptanceCriteria: Each clip entry in the admin clip management section displays the clip owner's full Principal ID
A copy-to-clipboard button is present next to each Principal ID
Clicking the copy button copies the full Principal ID to the clipboard

file_operations.description: Update the useClips hook to fetch and include the clip owner's Principal ID in the returned clip data. Modify the query to call actor.getAllClips() with admin context and enrich each clip with owner principal information by cross-referencing with user profile data or by updating the backend query to include owner principals directly in the response.

Add owner Principal ID display to the ClipCard component when rendered in an admin context. Show the full Principal ID of the clip owner with a copy-to-clipboard button. Use conditional rendering to only show this information when the current user is an admin. Add a monospace font for the Principal ID and visual feedback (toast or icon change) when successfully copied to clipboard.

Update MyClipsPage to conditionally render clip owner Principal IDs when viewed by an admin. Pass an isAdminView prop or context to ClipCard components so they know to display owner principal information. Ensure the page queries include owner data when accessed by an admin user.
